import sys, json
from typing import List

#  HELPER CLASSES  (do not modify)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
#  YOUR SOLUTION  <- Write your code inside the method below
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
class Solution:
    def differByOne(self, dict: List[str]) -> bool:
        pass

#  DRIVER  (do not modify)
if __name__ == '__main__':
    _args = json.loads(sys.stdin.readline())
    _dict = _args[0]
    _result = Solution().differByOne(_dict)

    print(json.dumps(_result))

solution.approach: The solution uses a rolling hash technique to efficiently compare strings by removing one character at a time and checking for matches.
